title: AI Feedback & Revision Study
description: A longitudinal study tracking how AI-generated feedback shapes revision quality in first-year writing courses.

title: Early-Warning Indicators in Engineering Courses
description: Developing predictive models from LMS log data to flag first-year engineering students who may need extra support.

title: Statewide Program Assessment Toolkit
description: Building a shared assessment toolkit that helps academic programs meet accreditation standards while improving instruction.

title: Curriculum Coherence in Online Graduate Programs
description: Examining how course sequencing and design choices affect learners' sense of coherence in fully online graduate programs.
